caption: A person dressed in a blue long-sleeved tunic and matching pants performs a martial arts routine with a staff in a large, indoor hall. Standing before a seated audience, the performer begins by holding the staff high above their head before swinging it downward and across their body in a wide, sweeping motion. The performer maintains a low, wide stance throughout the movement. In the background, rows of people in formal attire sit at tables draped with red cloths, watching the performance. The room is illuminated by warm, recessed lighting and wall sconces. As the sequence progresses, the performer moves the staff from an overhead position to a horizontal strike toward the left, eventually bringing the staff low and shifting their weight to complete the maneuver. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
